name: Join
description: A Kanban-based project management tool that helps teams organize tasks with drag-and-drop boards, user assignments and real-time updates.

name: Fantasy Platform
description: A classic jump-and-run browser game with enemies, collectibles and multiple levels – built entirely with vanilla JavaScript and OOP.

name: DA Bubble
description: A Slack-inspired real-time chat app with channels, direct messages, thread replies and emoji reactions – powered by Angular and Firebase.
